data.title: ElfQuest Blood of Ten Chiefs #1-20 Complete Run Warp Graphics Wendy Pini Lot
data.description:
ElfQuest Blood of Ten Chiefs was WaRP Graphics' anthology spinoff exploring the history of the chief elves across generations, running for 20 issues from 1993. This is the complete run, issues #1 through #20, with a bonus duplicate copy of #3.

Stored bagged with individual backing boards by a careful collector. Condition is Very Fine throughout — no major creasing, spine rolls, or cover damage.

Series | ElfQuest: Blood of Ten Chiefs
Publisher | WaRP Graphics
Issues | #1-20 (complete run)
Duplicates | Two copies of #3 included
Year | 1993
Condition | VF, bagged and boarded

All my listings ship with free shipping for your ease, none of this $30 shipping on a 1 pound item. I price my listings fairly but please feel free to make an offer. Comics are packed securely with cardboard backing to protect against bending in transit.

Sold As Is.
data.condition_field: Complete run of ElfQuest Blood of Ten Chiefs (WaRP Graphics, 1993), issues #1-20. 21 issues total including a bonus duplicate copy of #3. All issues individually bagged with backing boards. Condition is Very Fine throughout — no major creasing, spine rolls, or cover damage noted.
